items.speaker: Sonam
items.text: Hey, all done?

items.speaker: Sonam
items.text: Well, hustle up, will ya? If something happens, you're not the only one who's gonna be in trouble.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: To avoid alerting them, you pretend nothing's wrong and follow Sonam back to the auction. As the time ticks by, the crowd starts to grow more restless...

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: The final item: 300k Shell Credits. Any takers?

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: A deal like this doesn't come around very often.

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Hey, Sonam, that's one chill friend you brought to the auction. Hasn't even made a single bid yet!

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Hey, you. First time here?

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: I like new faces... How about I give you a “new customer" discount: 280k. How's that sound?

options.text: I don't have that kind of money.
It's not quite what I want...

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Tsk, what's that supposed to mean? You trying to stir up trouble?

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Or... are you trying to lowball me?

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: You carefully. Anyone who comes here, whether they buy something or not, is going to part with their money—that's the rule.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (I knew it. They're all in on it... Crooks stealing from other crooks. This auction was just one big setup from the start.)

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Just then, an Outcast walks over to the "trader" and whispers something in his ear. The "trader's" face suddenly turns dark.

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Well, well, Sonam. That customer of yours has some guts for tipping off the Spacetrek Collective. And all this time I thought you were one of us.

items.speaker: Sonam
items.text: What?! No! It wasn't me! I've been right here this whole time...

items.speaker: Outcast Messenger
items.text: I saw it! It was {Male=him;Female=her}! {Male=He;Female=She} was snooping around camp earlier!

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Heh... So it was you.

items.speaker: "Trader"
items.text: Get {Male=him;Female=her}! And I want this place cleaned up before they get here!

items.speaker: Sonam
items.text: Hey, did you find your wallet?

items.speaker: Sonam
items.text: Well, hustle up, will ya? If something happens, you're not the only one who's gonna be in trouble.
